_comment: Single source of truth for free-tier limits + the in-app guards (§6/§16.1). Verified live 2026-06-18.
firestoreDatabase: (default) @ asia-south2 (the only free-tier DB; named DBs are metered)

guards.reminders: event-driven Cloud Tasks (queue momentum-reminders) — one task per reminder at its fire time; NO cron; empty queue + closed app = zero compute
guards.edgeSecret: optional EDGE_SECRET header gate (unset until Cloudflare is fronted)

freeTier.geminiModel: gemini-2.5-flash (free tier; 503s under load -> in-app retry x3)

expectedUsage.note: single-owner personal tool; board polls a 1-doc version every 4s ONLY while a tab is open (paused when hidden), full board only on change; reminders are event-driven (no background polling)
expectedUsage.idleCompute: ZERO — no cron, empty Cloud Tasks queue when nothing is due and no tab open
expectedUsage.verdict: idle ₹0 by construction (nothing runs), active ₹0 (inside always-free quotas)
